business.name: Toledo House Wash
business.tagline: Making Toledo homes sparkle, one wash at a time

hero.headline: Your House Will Look *Brand New*
hero.subheadline: Professional soft washing that makes neighbors stop and stare — without the pressure damage.

services_section.label: THE WASH
services_section.heading: House, Deck, Patio — Everything Sparkling
services_section.subheading: Soft washing techniques that clean deep without damaging your surfaces

services.title: House Washing
services.description: Complete exterior cleaning that removes dirt, mildew, and stains. Your siding will look like it was just installed.

services.title: Deck Restoration
services.description: Gentle cleaning that brings weathered wood back to life. No splintering or damage from high pressure.

services.title: Patio Cleaning
services.description: Concrete, brick, and stone surfaces cleaned to original color. Years of buildup gone in one session.

services.title: Soft Wash System
services.description: Low-pressure cleaning with biodegradable solutions. Gets deeper clean than pressure alone, lasts longer too.

about.heading: Educated in the Craft
about.body: Toledo house washing team that knows the difference between cleaning and damaging. Real soft wash techniques, not just a pressure hose.

reviews.name: Adam Z.
reviews.text: Ty is simply the best! Makes every house look amazing. Truly educated in soft washing and completely professional.

reviews.name: William C.
reviews.text: Incredibly professional. Fair pricing, completed on schedule, excellent quality. Can't believe how good everything looks now!

reviews.name: Yovel A.
reviews.text: Extremely professional and nice to work with. House looks like new — you can tell she takes time to get everything done right.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Toledo & Surrounding Areas
service_areas.subheading: Professional house washing throughout Northwest Ohio

cta.heading: Ready for That Brand New Look?
cta.body: Free estimates, fair pricing, and results that make neighbors ask who did your house. One call gets it scheduled.
